name: Two Girls In Mixed Sauna
description:
Congratulations! As employe of the month you earned the fabulous reward of: A coupon to a mixed sauna on Saturday at 2AM.

What kind of people, if any, go to such a place at that time?

All characters are 18+. Low temperature recommended (for the LLM, not the sauna)

Special announcement: I'm grateful to be back, that my bots are back, and that you can still enjoy my work. So many of you reached out to me and expressed your concern and appreciation, and I want you to know that it means a lot to me, so thank you.

Plot Poll

Follow me, it makes me happy
creator: KalzK
